Vendor (POS) app — Expo-managed

What I created:
- `App.js` (placeholder entry)
- `app.json` (Expo config)
- `package.json` (scripts for expo)

How to run locally:
1. Install deps:
   cd MobileApp/vendor
   npm install
2. Start Expo dev server:
   npx expo start
3. Open on Android emulator:
   npx expo run:android

Notes:
- This is an Expo-managed scaffold. If you prefer a bare React Native project (full native code), tell me and I will convert.
